raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"A general section review centrally includes checking whether the contribution framing and contrast with synthesis-based aggregation are clear and coherent.","R1.2":"The reviewer would be expected to examine whether the pipeline description, training setup, aggregation step, selector, and evaluation claims form a consistent argument chain.","R1.3":"Because the section reports sensitivity, robustness, and competitiveness claims, review responsibility includes checking whether those claims align with the reported evaluation details.","R1.5":"Reviewing a section includes assessing whether the ordering from framework overview to stages to evaluation produces an effective section-level narrative.","R1.6":"The delegation most directly asks for review of prose, and the artifact contains sentence-level grammar, tense, concision, and flow issues that make writing polish load-bearing.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of review was intended by assigning broad but bounded responsibilities.","RX.2":"The reviewer must avoid endorsing competitive, robustness, or departure claims more strongly than the text and reported evidence support.","RX.3":"The task is only to review the section, so responsibilities must remain within paper-writing review rather than executing edits or external validation.","RX.4":"Because the artifact concerns medical imaging performance, review must attend to claims that could mislead downstream clinical interpretation.","RX.5":"Review responsibility includes keeping observations traceable to specific statements and reported evidence in the provided section."}}

rationale.R1.1: A general section review centrally includes checking whether the contribution framing and contrast with synthesis-based aggregation are clear and coherent.
rationale.R1.2: The reviewer would be expected to examine whether the pipeline description, training setup, aggregation step, selector, and evaluation claims form a consistent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: Because the section reports sensitivity, robustness, and competitiveness claims, review responsibility includes checking whether those claims align with the reported evaluation details.
rationale.R1.5: Reviewing a section includes assessing whether the ordering from framework overview to stages to evaluation produces an effective section-level narrative.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation most directly asks for review of prose, and the artifact contains sentence-level grammar, tense, concision, and flow issues that make writing polish load-bearing.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of review was intended by assigning broad but bounded responsibilities.
rationale.RX.2: The reviewer must avoid endorsing competitive, robustness, or departure claims more strongly than the text and reported evidence support.
rationale.RX.3: The task is only to review the section, so responsibilities must remain within paper-writing review rather than executing edits or external validation.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact concerns medical imaging performance, review must attend to claims that could mislead downstream clinical interpretation.
rationale.RX.5: Review responsibility includes keeping observations traceable to specific statements and reported evidence in the provided section.
